implemented_detail: PIL loadability checked; errors are logged per image.
build_compute_policy() classifies supported compute profile and logs device summary.
worker count derives from compute policy unless explicitly overridden.
detector mode is an argument and logged; cached YOLO+SCRFD is default.
native/half/quarter processing supported and logged.
face_count and boxes_available are logged and used.
dominant face height and area ratio are computed and logged.
condition labels/recommendation tokens are parsed where available; otherwise unknown is logged.
visual_disruption/source quality field is used and logged.
visible text risk triggers multimodal demo redaction action and log.
visible screen risk triggers multimodal demo redaction action and log.
multimodal_actions supports combined face and text/screen actions.
eligible and rejected methods are logged with rejection reasons.
privacy_floor_status is assigned per objective/method decision.
utility objectives route only with privacy/risk constraints and log utility status.
runtime-aware mode, expected_runtime_cost, actual runtime, and runtime_status are logged.
failure_avoidance objective and artifact/source-quality gates are implemented.
logged as not_applicable for deterministic methods; advanced face-changing methods remain rejected until validated.
quality_gate_status and source_quality_condition are logged and used.
evidence_level and source_artifacts are logged per image.
seven objective modes are implemented and validated.
route reason, explanation, residual risk, and rejection reasons are logged.
separate oracle/ablation artifacts are preserved and table-mapped; app validation produces comparable selector distributions.
